headline: Is State Street (STT) One of the Most Undervalued Quality Stocks to Invest In?
summary: State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) is one of the most undervalued quality stocks to invest in. On June 4, State Street announced that it had been selected by Principal Financial Group to provide custody, fund accounting, and administration services for Principal Funds. The expanded mandate deepens a long-standing relationship between the two firms. Under the agreement, […]
